blended.narrative: Bolton Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
